title: Manufacturing Engineer - Larsen & Toubro - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Larsen & Toubro - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Larsen & Toubro is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Larsen & Toubro:
Larsen & Toubro is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Larsen & Toubro!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
